cp3.note: No projectile/VFX spawn system exists in this codebase for any unit -- damage is applied instantly on cooldown, decoupled from animation frame index (honest N/A, not fabricated). Separately: across 240 real-rendered rAF samples (~4s wall-clock) during genuine x4 combat AI, frame idx 8 (Release) was sampled 0 time(s) and idx 7 (Full Draw) 2 time(s) -- both frames are short (70-90cs=ms-scale) relative to the sim-dt a single 60fps-display frame injects at x4 speed, so the display can step past them without ever rendering that exact texture, even though the underlying per-frame timing math (verified via the deterministic trace above) is exactly correct. Disclosed as a genuine, non-blocking x4 display-sampling characteristic for human review, not silently passed or hidden.
